nav.expertiseDesc: Guiding entrepreneurs and informing their decisions to pave the way to success.

hero.slide1Title: Your partner in audit, accounting and training
hero.slide1Lead: From Bangui, COSI Lewa-Consulting Group supports businesses and organizations in managing their accounts, tax obligations, and prepares students and professionals for the job market.
hero.slide2Lead: Bookkeeping, tax and social declarations, SYCEBNL support — a complete range of services for businesses and NGOs.
hero.slide3Lead: Finance professionals at your service to advise, audit and train you, in Bangui and throughout Central Africa.

about.title: Who we are
about.lead: A Central African firm of audit, accounting expertise and professional training.
about.paragraph1: Founded by Marie-Claire Ngbokoli, COSI Lewa-Consulting Group is a consulting, audit and training firm based in Bangui, Central African Republic. Since its creation, the firm's mission has been to support businesses, non-governmental organizations and public institutions in mastering their accounting, tax and social obligations.
about.paragraph2: Our team is made up of seasoned professionals, chartered accountants, auditors and trainers who put their experience at the service of your performance. We operate in all sectors of activity, from trade to humanitarian work, including microfinance and public services.
about.paragraph3: Beyond technical expertise, we build close and trusting relationships with each of our clients. We believe in a Central Africa where every organization has access to quality accounting and tax services to grow and innovate.

mission.title: Our mission
mission.lead: Reveal talents, secure finances, build the future.
mission.item1Desc: Provide businesses and NGOs with reliable accounting and tax expertise to secure their financial management and regulatory compliance.
mission.item2Desc: Be the trusted partner of Central African economic players, advising, auditing and training them with rigor and dedication.
mission.item3Desc: Prepare students and professionals for careers in accounting, finance and management through practical, certified training programs.
mission.item4Desc: Contribute to the economic development of Central Africa by promoting accounting and financial excellence as a growth lever.

services.title: Our areas of expertise
services.expertiseComptableDesc: Tailored support close to your challenges
services.conseilDesc: Expert advice at the right time
services.formationDesc: Certificate, attestation and professional CV included

formations.title: Featured training
formations.subtitle: Practical modules led by professionals, with certificate and attestation included.
formations.aboutPara1: COSI Lewa-Consulting Group offers quality professional training, led by experienced trainers from the business and accounting world.
formations.aboutPara2: Each module is designed to be practical and operational, with real case studies, applied exercises and personalized support throughout the training.
formations.aboutPara3: At the end of the training, you will receive a certificate of participation, an attestation detailing the skills acquired, as well as a professional CV highlighting your new skills.
formations.flexibleDesc: Sessions available on weekdays, evenings or weekends. Payment possible in weekly installments. Contact us to discuss your availability.
formations.levelInfoDebutant: No prerequisites needed. This training is accessible to everyone, regardless of background.
formations.levelInfoIntermediaire: Basic knowledge in the field is recommended to get the most out of this training.
formations.levelInfoAvance: This training requires solid knowledge in accounting or the relevant field. It is intended for professionals wishing to specialize.

testimonials.subtitle: The satisfaction of our partners, students and businesses is our greatest reward.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How do I register for a training program?
faq.r1: You can register by phone at +236 72 69 67 00, by email at cabinetcosi29@gmail.com, or via our online contact form. An advisor will help you choose the module best suited to your level and goals.
faq.r2: Payment can be made in cash or in weekly installments. We offer flexible payment options to make our training accessible to as many people as possible. Contact us to discuss terms.
faq.r3: Yes, each training program concludes with the issuance of a certificate of participation and an attestation. We also assist you in drafting your professional CV to showcase your new skills.
faq.q4: Can I take a training course in the evening or on weekends?
faq.r4: Absolutely. Our sessions are flexible and adapt to your availability: weekdays, evenings or weekends. Simply indicate your preferred time slots when registering.
faq.q5: Are there any prerequisites for registering?
faq.r5: Most of our training programs are accessible without specific prerequisites. For advanced modules (such as Sage Compta or SYCEBNL), basic accounting knowledge is recommended. Our team will advise you on the most suitable path.
faq.q6: Where do the training sessions take place?
faq.r6: Training takes place at our headquarters: Avenue des Martyrs — SOCATEL, across from Stade 20 000 Places, Bangui. We can also organize on-site sessions for businesses and organizations.
